findings.summary: DC Microgrid signal routing schematic with 301 CONNECTOR symbols for relay contacts and bus segments. Analyzer correctly parsed all components, wiring, and connectivity with no significant errors.

correct.description: All 301 components correctly identified as CONNECTOR type (P1-P301)
146 nets correctly extracted with proper connectivity
No false-positive signal detections — all detector sections correctly empty for a connector-only schematic

incorrect.description: kicad_version reported as '5 (legacy)' but file uses EELAYER 27 0 (KiCad 4 format, dated March 2016). Cosmetic since both parse identically.
file_version reported as '4' but actual EESchema Schematic File Version in header is 2

suggestions: Consider distinguishing KiCad 4 (EELAYER 27, file version 2) from KiCad 5 legacy (EELAYER 25+, file version 4) in version detection
